title: extended Eva ED video
wikitext:
[]: extended Eva ED video             Quote Post by Otaprince » Fri Apr 22, 2005 12:42 am http://www.tokyotosho.com/details.php?id=11985 this is pretty rad, and i have no idea where it came from: a 4 and a half minute extended, creditless video of Eva's end sequence, with Rei floating in the water to "Fly me to the Moon" definitely a cool bit of Eva omake, and a good example of Masayuki's obsession with water.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Apr 22, 2005 5:35 am It's off the Renewal "Test Type" DVD, just like the full, 4 minute version of the OP. I give it an extra star for including a good look at Rei's hooters

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Fri Apr 22, 2005 12:58 pm 4 min. version of the opening!?!?....linky?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 22, 2005 2:29 pm Shin-seiki wrote: It's off the Renewal "Test Type" DVD, just like the full, 4 minute version of the OP. I give it an extra star for including a good look at Rei's hooters

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Apr 22, 2005 3:20 pm Reichu wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: It's off the Renewal "Test Type" DVD, just like the full, 4 minute version of the OP. I give it an extra star for including a good look at Rei's hooters

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 22, 2005 3:53 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Speak for yerself...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Apr 22, 2005 4:50 pm Thats the PC term yes Me I still like to drool like a drunkin monkey and chant boobies, boobies, boobies I think its more polite 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Vodrake » Sun May 29, 2005 4:50 pm Would anybody who still has the full opening and ending mind uploading it for me? The downloads aren't working anymore. Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 29, 2005 7:30 pm Vodrake wrote: Would anybody who still has the full opening and ending mind uploading it for me? The downloads aren't working anymore. Thanks in advance.
